para.verbatim: return name of subtype for serialization purposes
returns cached bounding box of this point object in world coordinates; if you need bounding box in local coordinates please call getBoundingBox()
scale object size (all point positions)
clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources
set all object solid colors (front/back/etc.) from other object for all viewports

memberdef.argsstring: (self, ObjectPointsHolder src, VertMap thisToSrc, FaceMap thisToSrcFaces=...)
memberdef.name: copyColors

para.verbatim: copies point colors from given source object \\param src using given map \\param thisToSrc
get all visualize properties masks
returns maximal number of points that will be rendered if actual count of valid points is greater then the points will be sampled
returns size of points on screen in pixels

returns rendering discretization display each `renderDiscretization`-th point only, starting from 0 index, total number is \\ref numRenderingValidPoints() \\detail defined by maximum rendered points number as: \\ref numValidPoints() / \\ref getMaxRenderingPoints() (rounded up) updated when setting `maxRenderingPoints` or changing the cloud (setting `DIRTY_FACE` flag)
gets current selected points
returns selected points if any, otherwise returns all valid points
returns colors of selected vertices
returns per-point colors of the object
returns mask of viewports where given property is set
does the object have any model available (but possibly empty), e.g. ObjectMesh has valid mesh() or ObjectPoints has valid pointCloud()
does the object have any visual representation (visible points, triangles, edges, etc.), no considering child objects
returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap
returns count of valid points that will be rendered
returns cached information about the number of selected points
returns cached information about the number of valid points
\\return the pair ( point cloud, selected points ) if any point is selected or full point cloud otherwise
reset all object colors to their default values from the current theme
reset basic object colors to their default values from the current theme
sets current selected points
returns overriden file extension used to serialize point cloud inside this object, nullptr means defaultSerializePointsFormat()

sets some dirty flags for the object (to force its visual update) \\param mask is a union of DirtyFlags flags \\param invalidateCaches whether to automatically invalidate model caches (pass false here if you manually update the caches)
sets maximal number of points that will be rendered \\sa \\ref getRenderDiscretization, \\ref MaxRenderingPointsDefault, \\ref MaxRenderingPointsUnlimited
sets size of points on screen in pixels
sets colors of selected vertices
overrides file extension used to serialize point cloud inside this object: must start from '.', nullptr means serialize in defaultSerializePointsFormat()
sets per-point colors of the object
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object
Returns true if this class supports the property `type`. Otherwise passing it to the functions below is illegal.
swaps current selected points with the argument
swaps per-point colors of the object with given argument

Generated from: MR::ObjectPointsHolder
an object that stores a points
